aka: The Weapon, the Hour and the Motive

cast.name: 伦佐·蒙特纳尼  Renzo Montagnani
弗朗切斯科·达阿达 Francesco D'Adda
克洛迪娅·格拉维 Claudia Gravy
艾娃·查马利史 Eva Czemerys

writer.name: 维尼乔·马里努奇 Vinicio Marinucci
马尔切洛·阿里普兰迪 Marcello Aliprandi
马里奥·比安奇 Mario Bianchi

trans_title: The Weapon, the Hour and the Motive
introduction: In "The Weapon,the Hour and the Motive" the murder victim is a priest.Father Giorgio is stabbed to death in his congregation church.Two police detectives Franco Boito and Moriconi investigate his murder.The main suspects are Giorgio's two lovers Giulia and Orchidea as he wanted to break up with both.There is also an orphaned boy who saw too much from his attic hideout and he will resolve the mystery.Overlooked Italian giallo stylishly made by Francesco Mazzei.There are some silly comedic moments and some effective shocks.The throat slashing scene is fairly graphic and there is a bit of nudity and sexual perversion.Mazzei is capable of building suspense pretty well too."The Weapon,the Hour and the Motive" deserves more
